title: Dream SMPack
description:
This is a Dream SMP resourcepack that I worked on a while ago, when the dream smp was still going on. The pack has implemented an enormous amount of armors and even some items!
Credit: SAD-ist & Philza for some designs or inspiration ^^
body:
This pack allows you to be dressed as different characters from dream smp, through renaming of armor, tools, and some other stuff. I wrote a lot more in the original draft, but then I did a mistake and everything disappeared. I originally didn't want to touch more onto the pack after Technoblade's death, but since I don't want the link on the resourcepack to give money to a shady and bad redirection company, I've decided to post it on Modrinth instead.

### This resourcepack needs optifine to work as intended.

You can find all information that you may need, in the original submission on [Planetminecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/the-dreamsmpack-the-pack-for-you-and-your-favorite-content-creator/)

I highly suggest to check the gallery, as I show more of what the pack has available, in there.

If you can, this is a link to the foundation that Technoblade funded for, to cure cancer. https://www.curesarcoma.org
